title: paeonia humilis var. microcarpa
intro: Paeonia humilis var. microcarpa, also known as the small peony or Chinese peony, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia humilis var. microcarpa include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Paeonia humilis var. microcarpa can be found in the form of dried roots, capsules, and teas, and are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, insomnia, and menstrual cramps.
